    def test_engine_blocks_dependents_on_failure():
        """REQ_FAILED_BLOCKS_DEPENDENTS: denied step blocks all transitive dependents."""
        wf = make_wf(
            simple_step("deploy", gates=["prod-gate"], env="prod"),
            simple_step("notify", depends_on=["deploy"]),

        plan = build_plan(wf)

    def test_render_lists_steps_in_order():

        # str.index() finds each step name in its own rendered line, not in the
        # workflow header.  (Regression: "plan-test" contains "test".)
        wf = make_wf(
            simple_step("build"),

            simple_step("deploy", depends_on=["check"], gates=["dev-gate"]),
